details.reasoning: The implementation is well-structured and nearly complete. All requirements are met except for one critical naming mismatch: the component exports 'StepperPanel' instead of 'StepperContent' as explicitly required by the rubric. The demo file correctly uses this, but both deviate from the specification. All other aspects are excellent: (1) 'use client' directive present, (2) data-slot attributes on all components, (3) cn() utility used throughout, (4) React context properly implemented with createContext/useContext, (5) both horizontal and vertical orientations fully supported with appropriate styling, (6) demo example shows proper useState usage and both layout orientations, (7) registry entries correctly formatted with dependencies, (8) no existing files modified. The implementation is functionally sound and production-ready, but the export name discrepancy represents a failure to meet an explicit specification requirement.
